title: `_pickle_support.builtin_code` segfaults
author: devdanzin
body:
It's possible to segfault PyPy by calling `_pickle_support.builtin_code`:

```python
Python 3.10.14 (6b367d9e6715, Nov 14 2024, 04:48:15)
[PyPy 7.3.18-alpha0 with GCC 10.2.1 20210130 (Red Hat 10.2.1-11)] on linux
>>>> import _pickle_support
>>>> _pickle_support.builtin_code("")
Segmentation fault (core dumped)
```
Found using [fusil ](https://github.com/devdanzin/fusil) by @vstinner.
